title: Delegation Token Management in Hadoop MapReduce
description: The 'security/token/delegation' directory in Hadoop MapReduce is responsible for managing delegation tokens, which are used to delegate access to specific resources in a secure manner. The package-info.java file within this directory provides documentation for the DelegationTokenIdentifier class, offering insights into its intended use and stability. This file does not contain any core logic or direct inputs/outputs, but rather serves as a metadata provider for the package, detailing its audience, licensing, and stability using classes like InterfaceAudience and InterfaceStability. The directory's architectural role is primarily informational, employing a metadata documentation pattern to facilitate understanding and usage of the DelegationTokenIdentifier class.
